title: Crew Clock-In Wave B — QR Quick Clock-In
description: Lead tech generates a QR code on CrewClockInScreen. Crew members scan with phone camera, open tech.numeruspro.com/clock-in?token=XXX — a lightweight standalone web page (no app required). Selfie + submit → time entry created. Uses short-lived session tokens stored in clock_in_sessions table.

endpoints.description: Lead tech creates a clock-in session with short-lived token (5 min TTL)
Verify session token, return WO info (no auth required — token-based)
Submit clock-in with token + technician name + GPS (no auth required)

modifications.description: Create clock_in_sessions table for QR session tokens
New route file for clock-in session endpoints (verify + submit are unauthenticated)
Add POST /work-orders/:id/clock-in-session endpoint for lead tech
Standalone HTML page for QR clock-in — selfie capture, GPS, submit form. No React, no app install required.
Add QR code display button. Generate session token via API, show QR code with tech.numeruspro.com/clock-in?token=XXX

doNotTouch.reason: Existing crew clock-in — unchanged. Self-clock-in from wave 151 stays.

schemaChanges.description: Session tokens for QR clock-in. UUID PK, tenant_id, work_order_id, created_by, session_token (unique), expires_at, is_active.

integrationChecks.description: GET /clock-in/verify?token=XXX returns WO info for valid token, error for expired/invalid
POST /clock-in/submit with valid token creates time entry
clock-in/index.html exists and contains form, camera access, submit logic

rollbackPlan.immediate: Drop clock_in_sessions table. Remove routes. Remove clock-in HTML page.
rollbackPlan.safeFallback: QR clock-in unavailable — lead device clock-in and self-clock-in still work.
rollbackPlan.dataImpact: clock_in_sessions is new table — drop is safe. Time entries created via QR are standard records.

selfCheck.step: Deploy API + tech-web. Create session via API. Open tech.numeruspro.com/clock-in?token=XXX. Verify page loads, shows WO info, has camera/submit.

delegation.description: Mayor-direct. Migration + API + standalone HTML + mobile QR.

notes: QR clock-in page is standalone HTML — no React, no app install. Crew members just scan QR and open URL in phone browser. Session tokens expire in 5 minutes and are single-use per technician.
